title: Derived condition pushdown return wrong results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `t4` (`c_id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL, `c_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `c_active` tinyint(1) DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE VIEW `tx_cmplx_004` AS SELECT t4.c_name, t2.c_discount FROM t4 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t4.c_id = t2.c_id WHERE t4.c_active IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM tx_cmplx_004 WHERE c_discount IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Derived condition pushdown with view returns incorrect results
